chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6232 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY: 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.29145/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 9th August 2024 Mr. Ch. Muhammad Anwar Shahid, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Asst. Attorney General. Mr. Mohsin Ali, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Saeed Shahzad, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent No.3. -*-*-*-*-*- Through this Petition the petitioner has sought following prayers: - a. To direct the Respondents No.2 & 3 to provide detail of other unknown cases/FIRs (if any) registered against the petitioner and submit the same before this Honourable Court. b. To Restrain the Respondents from harassing the petitioner and his employees. c. To Restrain the Respondent No.3 from taking any action against the petitioner as well as from the arresting the petitioner wherein the petitioner is not nominate in the false FIRs as mentioned in Para No.3 of this Petition as well as in other unknown FIRs. d. Any other relief(s) which deems to fit and appropriate in the circumstances of the case in favour of the petitioner. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner has been confronted as to the above prayers, which apparently cannot be granted, nor is a cause of action to invoke the Constitutional jurisdiction of this Court and in response, learned counsel submits that he will not press this Petition, however, respondents

Any other relief(s) which deems to fit and appropriate in the circumstances of the case in favour of the petitioner. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner has been confronted as to the above prayers, which apparently cannot be granted, nor is a cause of action to invoke the Constitutional jurisdiction of this Court and in response, learned counsel submits that he will not press this Petition, however, respondents [Page 2] be directed to act strictly in accordance with law and shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
